body:
## 咕咕服官方模组包

======================
此模组包包括了优化和便利的诸多模组，能大幅度优化玩家体验。如果你没有自己喜欢的模组包的话，推荐下载这个！

GGC server official recommended modpack
=====================
This modpack contains many optimized and convenient mods, which can greatly optimize the player experiences.

这个模组包包括了小地图/帧数优化/生存工具等60个项目，也包括了咕咕服最新的材质包。下载模组包后可以直接游玩。
This modack includes 60 mods such as minimap/fps optimization/survival tools, and also includes the latest texture pack of the GGC server. You can play directly after downloading the module pack.
